creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier - interfaSys sàrl from comment #2)
> I can't provide a patch yet, but adding -liconv to the CFLAGS works, so it's
> a matter of adding it to the Makefile properly.

I've tested this port in poudriere and have been unable to reproduce the problem.

What version of FreeBSD are you experiencing this on?

Looking at the port Makefile it looks like it already has all the needed pieces.
